metadata.name: Process an Invoice with an Early Payment Discount

description: A vendor offers a 2% discount if their invoice is paid within 10 days. An accountant needs to process the payment to take advantage of the discount.

nodes.task_description: Identify an approved invoice that has a '2/10, n/30' payment term and is still within the discount period.
Schedule the invoice for immediate payment, calculating the reduced payment amount after the 2% discount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the discounted payment amount.

nodes.task_description: Execute the payment and ensure the discount is correctly recorded in the general ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes the payment and posts the transaction, crediting 'Purchase Discounts'.
